title: Icy Shattered Italian Hind Shank Pasta
description: A malty and shattering post-workout dish featuring hind shank, shaped like nigiri-sushi for a unique pasta experience.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to medium heat.
Season the hind shank with salt and pepper. Sear both sides in a pan until golden brown, about 5 minutes per side.
Cook pasta according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a separate pan, lightly sauté minced garlic and italian herbs in olive oil for about 1 minute.
Add the shanked hind shank into the garlic-herb mixture, pour over any accumulated juices from the pan (from the searing), and let it cook until the liquid is reduced by half.
Mix in the cooked pasta with the sauce, ensuring each strand is coated evenly.
Transfer the mixture onto a raclette grill. Use a spatula to gently fold and break apart the pasta into smaller pieces resembling nigiri-sushi.
Serve hot, garnished with grated parmesan cheese.
